mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM t_tag WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND tag_name IN
#{name}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_tag (tag_name, tag_category, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, is_deleted) VALUES
(#{tag.tagName}, #{tag.tagCategory}, #{tag.createTime}, #{tag.createBy}, #{tag.updateTime}, #{tag.updateBy}, #{tag.isDeleted})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE tag_category = VALUES(tag_category), update_time = VALUES(update_time), update_by = VALUES(update_by)
